# anypoint_transit_gateways (Data Source)

Lists transit gateways across an organization, optionally filtered by region and private space id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lists transit gateways across the whole organization.
# Optional filters: region, private_space_id.

data "anypoint_transit_gateways" "all" {
  org_id = var.root_org
}

data "anypoint_transit_gateways" "us_east_2" {
  org_id = var.root_org
  region = "us-east-2"
}

output "all_tgws" {
  value = data.anypoint_transit_gateways.all.transit_gateways
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (String)

### Optional

- `private_space_id` (String) Private space id filter.
- `region` (String) AWS region filter.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `transit_gateways` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--transit_gateways))

<a id="nestedatt--transit_gateways"></a>
### Nested Schema for `transit_gateways`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `resource_share_account` (String)
- `resource_share_id` (String)
- `routes` (List of String)
- `space_name` (String)
- `status_attachment` (String)
- `status_gateway` (String)
- `tgw_resource_url` (String)
- `transit_gateway_id` (String)
